name: Washington's Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cherries and pour into the unbaked pie shell.
2. Cream margarine, flour, and sugar replacement in a bowl until smooth.
3. Add egg yolks to the mixture and beat until well combined.
4. Stir in evaporated milk and vanilla extract, ensuring the mixture is smooth.
5. Pour the cherry filling over the cherries in the pie shell.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
8. In a separate bowl, whip egg whites until soft peaks form.
9. Gradually add granulated sugar replacement to the whipped egg whites, beating until thick and stiff.
10. Spread the meringue over the cherry filling, carefully sealing the edges of the pie shell.
11. Bake at 350°F for an additional 12-15 minutes, or until delicately browned.
Serving suggestion:
1 serving (1/8 of the pie) contains approximately 88 calories from the fruit and fat components plus the calories from the pie shell.
